_______________________________________
Working with VoxTek as a technician and VoxвҖҷs secretary means you are fairly familiar with his personal life (since he never seems to let you leave his side) and one of those big parts of his personal life if Valentino, another Overlord that owns the largest porn studio in all of hell. 

You get to lay witness to all arguments that take place between the two and often get dragged into them, and today is no different when Vox takes you to come calm Valentino down after one of his porn stars whom he has a contract with (Angel Dust) moves out of the apartment heвҖҷs been living in for a while to go live at some stupid вҖңHazbin HotelвҖқ.
creator: Aaaakane
